svg.title: MakySchool scalable architecture diagram
svg.desc: Multi-tenant SaaS architecture with DNS, reverse proxy, Next.js frontend, Express API, and supporting services

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain how wildcard DNS works for multi-tenant subdomains like easton.makyschool.com')
sendPrompt('How does Caddy reverse proxy handle multi-tenant subdomain routing and inject school_id?')
g.text: Resolves subdomain → extracts school slug → routes traffic

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I structure the Next.js App Router for MakySchool multi-tenant frontend?')
sendPrompt('How do I write Next.js middleware to read the subdomain and inject school_id into every request?')
sendPrompt('How should I structure the Express.js API for MakySchool with multi-tenant school_id middleware?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement JWT authentication with role-based access control in Express.js?')
sendPrompt('What job queue should I use with Express.js for PDF generation and SMS sending in MakySchool?')
sendPrompt('How do I design the PostgreSQL schema for multi-tenant MakySchool with school_id on every table?')
sendPrompt('What should I store in Redis for MakySchool — sessions, cache, or both?')
sendPrompt('Where should MakySchool store uploaded logos, stamps, and generated PDF report cards?')
sendPrompt('How do I build the SchoolPay webhook receiver in Express.js to activate school subscriptions?')
sendPrompt('How do I integrate MakyReach SMS API in Express.js with credit check and delivery logging?')
sendPrompt('What email service should MakySchool use for password reset and notification emails?')

svg.text: ← tenant subdomains, all isolated by school_id
